Manage_Scheduler_Jobs.description: Table of batch jobs; interactive columns for toggling and editing schedules.
Manage_Scheduler_Jobs.notes: Other columns (Previous Run Status, Next Run Time, Currently Running) are passive displays and therefore not represented as interactive elements.

Scheduler_Global_Toggle.on_change_on_success: starts or stops execution of all scheduled jobs
Scheduler_Global_Toggle.on_success: when enabled scheduler executes scheduled jobs; when disabled scheduled jobs will not execute

Global_Configuration.description: System-wide feature flags and configuration values.

Manage_Codes.description: List of code lists. Clicking a code navigates to manage its values.

Code_List_Detail.description: Values for a specific code list. Supports adding, editing, reordering, and deactivating entries.

top_actions.on_success: reorders entries which changes dropdown ordering

row_actions.on_success: marks entry inactive so it no longer appears in dropdowns

Manage_Data_Tables.description: Lists custom data tables that extend core entities.

row_actions.on_success: opens Create/Edit form for the selected custom data table

submit_actions.on_success: creates custom data table with defined columns

Audit_Trails.description: System audit trail with filters and maker-checker actions for pending commands.
